{% if vendor_obj %}
Vendor Information
{{ vendor_obj.company_name1 }}
{{ vendor_obj.company_name2 }}
{{ vendor_obj.code }}
{{ vendor_obj.status_name }}
{{ vendor_obj.vendor_type }}
{{ vendor_obj.dba }}
{{ vendor_obj.payment_terms }}
{{ vendor_obj.notes }}
{{ vendor_obj.language }}
{{ vendor_obj.search_keywords }}
Vendor Details Tax Banks Attachments Products
{% else %}
Vendor Information
{{ form.company_name1.label_tag }} {{ object.company_name1 }}
{{ form.company_name2.label_tag }} {{ object.company_name2 }}
{{ object.code }}
{{ form.status.label_tag }} {{ object.status_name }}
{{ form.vendor_type.label_tag }} {{ object.vendor_type }}
{{ form.dba.label_tag }} {{ object.dba }}
{{ form.payment_terms.label_tag }} {{ object.payment_terms }}
{{ form.notes.label_tag }} {{ object.notes }}
{{ form.language.label_tag }} {{ object.language }}
{{ form.search_keywords.label_tag }} {{ object.search_keywords }}
Vendor Details Tax Banks Attachments Products
{% endif %}
